Secure & supervised

24x7 warden, CCTV in common areas, strict visitor log — peace of mind for parents back home.

Near Deogiri College & DIEMS

No bunk beds — ever

Proper single beds, personal wardrobe, and study desk in every room. Twin and standard options available.

Simple, transparent pricing

Two plans — one for privacy, one for value

per month

1 room · 2 beds · more privacy

  • Only one roommate

₹2,999
per month

2 rooms · 3–4 beds · best value

  • Lively, social environment

Prices exclude meals. Nearby tiffin service available. Academic year plans on request.

Common questions

Frequently asked questions

We offer two simple plans. Twin sharing (1 room, 2 beds) is ₹5,000 per month — ideal for students who prefer more privacy and a quieter environment. Standard sharing (3–4 beds per room) is ₹2,999 per month — our most popular, best-value option. Both plans exclude meals. Cafe Aveen's nearby and home tiffin delivery are available for food.

No. We have a separate cafe nearby named "Cafe Aveen's". Along with home-delivered tiffins we also serve various food items such as Maggi, Omelette, Biryani, and more.

The building is a private gated property with CCTV coverage in common areas, 24x7 female staff, and strict visitor policies. Parents are informed instantly about any late-night movement.

Submit the enquiry form or contact us on call or WhatsApp. We will confirm the availability, followed by a token advance to confirm the booking.

Parents are welcome during visiting hours every weekend.

Residents are expected to return by 9:00 PM on weekdays and 9:30 PM on weekends. Late entry requires prior intimation to the warden. Parents are notified of any unplanned late arrivals. This policy ensures safety and is strictly followed.

Jyoti Girls PG is approximately 3.5 km from Chhatrapati Sambhajinagar railway station — around 10–12 minutes by auto rickshaw. The PG is easily accessible from the station on arrival day. We can arrange pickup assistance on request.

The monthly rent covers your bed, personal wardrobe storage, 24x7 power backup, high-speed Wi-Fi, daily housekeeping of rooms and common areas, RO drinking water, and 24x7 warden supervision. Meals are not included — affordable tiffin and food options are available nearby.

Parents are welcome to visit every weekend during visiting hours — Saturday and Sunday, 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM. Weekday visits can be arranged with prior notice to the warden. Parents also have direct WhatsApp access to the owner for real-time updates.

A hostel typically has dormitory-style bunk beds, shared bathrooms, and institutional management. A PG (Paying Guest) like Jyoti Girls PG offers private or semi-private rooms with proper beds, personal storage, and a homely, family-run environment. We combine the safety of a hostel with the comfort of a home — no bunk beds, ever.

Yes, a refundable security deposit of one month's rent is collected at the time of admission. This is fully refunded within 7 days of vacating, subject to no damage to property. No hidden charges — all costs are communicated upfront.

Step 1: WhatsApp or call us to check current availability. Step 2: Schedule a visit to see the room in person. Step 3: Pay a token advance of ₹500 to hold the bed. Step 4: Complete admission formalities and pay the first month's rent + security deposit before moving in. Beds fill quickly during admission season — early enquiry is strongly recommended.

Ready to visit? Start the admissions process →
